summary: Iteration 15 - Feature Testing Complete: All 5 requested features verified. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Sidebar loads without errors, no 'Error loading Sidebar' text found.

minor.issue: LLM in fallback mode due to rate limiting (returns context data without LLM processing)

Recipe import endpoint working with JSON-LD schema.org parsing (bbcgoodfood.com tested successfully)
Recipe import error handling correct - returns 400 for invalid URL format, 422 for missing URL field
Sidebar.tsx Settings import fix verified - no duplicate Cloud import, Settings properly imported from lucide-react
AppFull.tsx safeLazy error text fix verified - shows 'Error loading {name}' instead of generic error

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified: 1) AI³ NLP endpoint includes food_knowledge (8000 items) in context for culinary queries, 2) Recipe import from URL works with bbcgoodfood.com (sites like allrecipes.com block scraping - expected), 3) Recipe import error handling returns proper HTTP codes, 4) Sidebar loads without 'Error loading Sidebar' text, 5) Health endpoint returns healthy. LLM is in fallback mode due to rate limiting but food_knowledge context is correctly gathered and returned.
